intro.title: What's Your Life Rebrand Style?
intro.subtitle: A quick diagnostic to reveal how you're wired to reinvent your life — and the best place for you to start.
intro.meta: Five questions · about two minutes · one clear next step

email.title: See Your Life Rebrand Style
email.subtitle: We'll save your result and give you a personalized starting point.
email.consent: By continuing you agree to receive your quiz result and occasional tips from Palette Plotting. Unsubscribe anytime.
email.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
email.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

result.buildPractice: Start your rebrand in Palette Plotting.

q1.prompt: When you imagine the life you're building, what usually happens?

options.big_picture_blurry: I can feel it, but I can't picture the details.
options.too_many_directions: I want a lot of things at once and can't pick a lane.
options.freeze: I get overwhelmed and keep putting it off.
options.collect_inspiration: I start collecting images and inspiration.

q2.prompt: What's frustrated you most about past attempts to change your life?

options.nothing_visual: Nothing visual to keep the goal in front of me.
options.no_system: I never had one place to organize everything.
options.lost_steam: I lost steam after the first few days.
options.space_mismatch: My space never matched the life I was reaching for.

options.daydreamer: I daydream constantly but rarely map it out.
options.vibe_first: I need it to look and feel right before I commit.
options.grinder_no_setup: I work hard, but my setup is an afterthought.

options.make_concrete: Turning the dream into something concrete.
options.stay_consistent: Sticking with it past week one.
options.make_cohesive: Making it all feel cohesive and intentional.
options.build_environment: Building an environment that supports it.

q5.prompt: What would actually help you right now?

options.one_system: One system that holds everything in one place.
options.moodboard: A moodboard that captures the feeling I'm after.
options.home_office: Boards for my home and workspace.

vision_dreamer.title: The Vision Dreamer
vision_dreamer.explanation: You can feel the life you want, but it lives in your head as a mood rather than a map. Without something visual to anchor it, the vision stays fuzzy — and fuzzy is hard to move toward.
vision_dreamer.actionStep: Pick the single clearest image of your future self and describe it in one sentence. Put that sentence somewhere you'll see it daily this week.
vision_dreamer.paletteplottingPitch: Palette Plotting turns that fuzzy picture into a real Vision board you can see and refine — so your future finally has a place to live outside your head.

scattered_starter.title: The Scattered Starter
scattered_starter.explanation: You're not short on ambition — you're short on structure. Ideas pile up faster than you can organize them, so nothing gets a real foundation.
scattered_starter.actionStep: List every direction you're being pulled toward, then circle just one to start this week. The rest can wait on the board.
scattered_starter.paletteplottingPitch: Palette Plotting gives you one four-board system — vision, home, office, and mood — so all your ideas finally have a home instead of ten half-started lists.

stuck_resetter.title: The Stuck Resetter
stuck_resetter.explanation: You want the change badly, but the size of it freezes you. You start, lose momentum, and restart from scratch — over and over.
stuck_resetter.actionStep: Shrink it. Choose one tiny piece of your rebrand and give yourself five minutes on it today. Momentum beats intensity.
stuck_resetter.paletteplottingPitch: Palette Plotting lets you start with one small board and build from there — no all-or-nothing overhaul, just a first step you can actually keep.

aesthetic_curator.title: The Aesthetic Curator
aesthetic_curator.explanation: You commit through feeling. If it doesn't look and feel right, it won't stick — and a plain to-do list will never move you.
aesthetic_curator.actionStep: Gather five images that capture the exact feeling of the life you want. Notice the thread between them — that's your direction.
aesthetic_curator.paletteplottingPitch: Palette Plotting is built for people who think in visuals — start with a Moodboard that captures the feeling, then let the rest of your rebrand grow from it.

space_builder.title: The Space Builder
space_builder.explanation: You put in the work, but your environment never caught up. Your space and routine don't reflect the life you're building — so it's a constant uphill push.
space_builder.actionStep: Pick one corner of your home or workspace and change one thing today so it points at the life you want.
space_builder.paletteplottingPitch: Palette Plotting gives you Home and Office boards to design the spaces around your goals — so your environment finally works with you instead of against you.
